---
title: Investigating the Use of Terrain Attributes in Characterizing Soil Geochemistry and Colour Properties
author:
  - name: Maria Luna Miño 
    orcid: 0009-0004-3739-5103
    corresponding: false
    email: LUNAMIMA56@brandonu.ca
    roles:
      - MSc thesis
      - Sample collection
      - Lab analysis
      - Initial data analysis
      - Initial draft of manuscript
    affiliations:
      - name: Brandon University, Masters in Environmental and Life Sciences
        address: 270 18th St
        city: Brandon
        state: MB
        postal-code: R7A 6A9
  - name: Alexander J Koiter
    orcid: 0000-0002-9355-9561
    corresponding: true
    email: koitera@brandonu.ca
    roles:
      - Principle investigator
      - Primary author
      - Statistics
      - Visualization
    affiliations:
      - name: Brandon University, Department of Geography and Environment
        address: 270 18th St
        city: Brandon
        state: MB
        postal-code: R7A 6A9
  - name: Taras E Lychuk
    corresponding: false
    email: taras.lychuk@AGR.GC.CA
    orcid: 0000-0002-8227-5571
    roles:
      - Spatial data analysis
      - Project design
      - Author
    affiliations:
      - name: Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada, Brandon Research and Development Centre
        address: 2701 Grand Valley Road
        city: Brandon
        state: MB
        postal-code: R7A 5Y3
  - name: Arnie Waddel
    corresponding: false
    email: arnie.waddell@AGR.GC.CA
    roles:
      - Spatial data analysis
      - Author
    affiliations:
      - name: Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada, Brandon Research and Development Centre
        address: 2701 Grand Valley Road
        city: Brandon
        state: MB
        postal-code: R7A 5Y3
  - name: Alan Moulin
    orcid: 0000-0003-4844-9571
    corresponding: false
    email: apmaafc7788@gmail.com
    roles: 
      - Spatial data analysis
      - Author
    affiliations:
      - name: Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada, Brandon Research and Development Centre
        address: 2701 Grand Valley Road
        city: Brandon
        state: MB
        postal-code: R7A 5Y3      
keywords:
  - Soil geochemistry
  - Soil colour
  - Spatial analysis
  - Terrain attributes
abstract: |
  test
  
  
plain-language-summary: |
  Spatial analysis is tricky buisness
key-points:
  - Colour properties and the agricultural land use exhibited lower variability and more symmetrical data
  - Soil properties at the agricultural site exhibited stronger spatial autocorrelation
  - Elevation, SAGA Wetness Index, and relative slope position were ranked as the most important predictor 
date-modified: last-modified
bibliography: references.bib
csl: geoderma.csl
citation:
  container-title: TBD
number-sections: true
---

Everything is base on the 49 points only
to compare to interpolated data see 

## Univariate

{{< embed notebooks/univariate_analysis.qmd#tbl-univariate-summary >}}

{{< embed notebooks/univariate_analysis.qmd#tbl-univariate-summary2 >}}

{{< embed notebooks/univariate_analysis.qmd#tbl-correlation >}}

## Spatial

{{< embed notebooks/semivariogram.qmd#tbl-geocol-semivariogram >}}

## Random Forest

{{< embed notebooks/RF_summary.qmd#tbl-rf-summary >}}

{{< embed notebooks/RF_summary.qmd#fig-rf-results >}}
